title: Wynnchanger
body:
Wynnchanger is a client‑side Wynncraft cosmetics browser for weapons and hats. It reads the Wynncraft resource pack to list available models, shows a live in‑menu player preview, and applies your selection locally. Glint choices are supported when the pack includes them. All changes are visual‑only on your client and never affect other players or the server.
  
![Main skinchanger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/622c06505d73be5d27ad70ba1f0c31cdc62ff67d.png)
